nasb.text: May the God who has caused His name to dwell there overthrow any king or people who attempts to change it, so as to destroy this house of God in Jerusalem. I, Darius, have issued this decree, let it be carried out with all diligence!”

esv.text: May the God who has caused his name to dwell there overthrow any king or people who shall put out a hand to alter this, or to destroy this house of God that is in Jerusalem. I Darius make a decree; let it be done with all diligence.”

cnv.text: 願那使自己的名居住在那裡的　神，毀滅所有伸手更改這命令，或要毀壞這在耶路撒冷　神的殿的君王和人民。我大利烏下令，必須徹底遵行。”

ccb.text: 无论君王还是百姓，若有人擅自更改这命令或毁坏耶路撒冷的这殿，愿拣选这殿作其居所的上帝毁灭他！我大流士降此谕旨，务要速速遵行。”
